zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna De Tryl於1316年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特武德藍茲時，她的父親Walter de Tryl57歲，母親Ela36歲。她於1338年4月與William De Carent在英國英格蘭多瑟特武德藍茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾肯智 班可享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tryl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish and Czech: from the personal name Tyl, a Slavicized form of German Till and Thiel 1. The same Sorbian surname, which may also be from a short form of the personal name Bartyl ‘Bartholomew’ (see Barthel ), is found only in a Germanized form, Thiel 2.

variants.name: Till
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Till, a pet form of Old French Matild(e) (in its Latin form Matilda), which was an alternative to Maud; see Maude 2. A diminutive form occurs in Tillotson .

variants.name: Tylicki
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Juliusz, Janusz.
Polish: habitational name for someone from Tylice in Kuyavian-Pomeranian Voivoideship or Tylisz in Lesser Poland Voivodeship, named with the personal name Tyl or its variant Tyla.

variants.name: Tillack
meanings: Germanized form of Sorbian and Polish Tylak: from a derivative of the personal name Tyl .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna De Tryl was born in 1316, in Woodlands, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter de Tryl, was 57 and her mother, Ela, was 36. She married William De Carent in April 1338, in Woodlands, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1346, in Kents Bank, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

Elle a épousé William De Carent en avril 1338, à Woodlands, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1346, à Kents Bank, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna De Tryl(이)가 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 우들랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Tryl(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1338년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 우들랜드즈에서 William De Carent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄츠 뱅크에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna De Tryl родилась в 1316 г. в местности вудландс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter de Tryl было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Carent апрель 1338 г. в местности вудландс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1346 г. в местности кэнц банк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
